title: Council (canonical entity file)
description: One file per local council: data/councils/<slug>.json. Identity (id) is permanent; everything mutable — name, BSA council number, HQ, website, states served, territory membership — lives in effective-dated versions. Mergers, absorptions, renames, and dissolutions are events in data/councils/_events.json.

name.description: Official council name during this window, without a trailing ', BSA'.

bsa_number.description: BSA council number during this window. An attribute, not identity — numbers can change or collide across history.

website.description: Official council website during this window.

states_served.description: States/territories the council's service area touches. Empty = not yet recorded.

territory.description: National subdivision membership during this window (National Service Territory since 2021; region/area before). Time-varying membership falls out of versioning.
